title: delarbrea montana subsp. montana
intro: Delarbrea montana subsp. montana, also known as the 'Mountain Carrot', is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Araliaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Delarbrea montana subsp. montana include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and leaves are often used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures that can be used to treat various health issues.
